However, keep in mind that Pollo Sprite’s effect is tied to eliminations, so it is particularly good for players who get into a lot of fights.Like all Sprites in Chapter 7 Season 3, the Pollo Sprite gets better as you level it up:At the maximum level, the Pollo Sprite gives you and your teammates 10 seconds of passive shield regeneration. This makes it among the strongest support Sprites.The jump from 6 seconds to 10 seconds at level 5 might seem small, but over the course of a match those extra seconds can restore a significant amount of shield.This was all you needed to know about the Pollo Sprite in Fortnite.
Article Summary: The Pollo Sprite has been added to Fortnite in the v41.20 update. It is modeled after 18-year-old American-Mexican player Pollo. Pollo is one of the most decorated competitors in Fortnites history. He has multiple FNCS championships and the 2024 FNCs Global Championship title to his name.

Article Title: Who was Gabriella Muñoz? Everything to know about the college softball star who passed away at 19
Article Text:
Gabriella Muñoz. Image via: Livingstone College Athletics

Who was Gabriella Muñoz?

Is Gabriella Muñoz's cause of death revealed?

Statement from Gabriella Muñoz's college

Livingstone College softball head coach mourns Gabriella Muñoz's untimely demise

Gabriella Muñoz. Image via: Schmidt Funeral Home

Gabriella Muñoz, a rising junior on the Livingstone College softball team, died July 9 at 12:03 p.m. local time, according to the Harris County Institute of Forensic Sciences in Houston. The Katy, Texas native was 19, just shy of her 20th birthday, and was not on campus at the time of her death.Muñoz wore No. 55 for the Blue Bears and had built a reputation both on the field and in the classroom. Her death has prompted tributes from her college, her youth softball community, and her family as they prepare to honor her life this week.Gabriella Muñoz played as a versatile utility player for Livingstone College, a role the school said she embraced with determination and a team-first mentality. Beyond the field, she carried a 3.75 cumulative GPA and earned Dean's List honors during both semesters of the 2025-26 academic year, according to the college's official statement. She also received a Board of Trustees Scholarship.A 2024 graduate of Obra D. Tompkins High School in Katy, she is survived by her parents, Brandon and Jennifer, and siblings Noah and Isabella.No official cause has been released. The Harris County Institute of Forensic Sciences confirmed the time of death but reported that the cause and manner remain pending, with the full report not yet complete.Livingstone College has pushed back publicly against inaccurate claims circulating about where she died, clarifying that she passed away in Texas rather than on campus.Livingstone College released a statement describing Muñoz as someone who represented the best of the school. The statement highlighted her personality alongside her athletic contributions, noting her "bubbly personality, gentle spirit, and genuine kindness" left a lasting impression on those around her. The school also asked the public to stop sharing unverified information about her death out of respect for her family.“While her athletic abilities made her a valuable competitor, it was her bubbly personality, gentle spirit, and genuine kindness that truly distinguished her. Her infectious smile, positive outlook, and caring heart brought light to every room she entered and left a lasting impression on teammates, coaches, classmates, faculty, staff, and friends.”Livingstone College president Anthony J. Davis said in the statement, “It is difficult to understand the insensitive actions that some will take during this time of our campus community grieving. Our focus remains on honoring Gabriella’s life, celebrating her many contributions to our campus community, and supporting all who are mourning this tremendous loss.”Head coach Steve Wallace spoke directly about her impact on the program, saying, "I am completely heartbroken by the passing of Gabriella." The youth softball organization Envy Softball also paid tribute on Facebook, remembering her drive and her love for the game, and announced her jersey number will be retired in her honor.A celebration of Muñoz's life is scheduled for July 17 at St. Bartholomew the Apostle Catholic Church in Katy. Her family has asked that donations in her memory go to the Epilepsy Foundation of Texas, an organization her obituary describes as close to her heart.
Article Summary: Gabriella Muñoz, a rising junior on the Livingstone College softball team, died July 9 at 12:03 p.m. local time. The Harris County Institute of Forensic Sciences confirmed the time of death but reported that the cause and manner remain pending. The Katy, Texas native was 19, just shy of her 20th birthday.

Article Title: England's World Cup dream ends in silence as Argentina stun fans in London
Article Text:
Football Fans watch the Argentina v England semi-final game of the FIFA World Cup 2026 (Photo by Jo Hale/Getty Images)

LONDON: England flags were hanging in cafes, outside Asian corner shops and vape shops and even at estate agents. The pubs were the most decked out. Many had put TV screens up all around, with extra screens in beer gardens and most pubs were fully booked.Three hours before the Argentina-England semi-final, pubs started to get packed with men and women in football shirts, some draped in England flags. Many were convinced it was England’s time and she would win. But some were anxious saying Egypt had been cheated in their match against Argentina when they had a second goal controversially disallowed and their request for video review of an Argentina goal denied. This was something taxi drivers repeatedly brought up.The extremely hot weather had put everyone in a good mood though. Pubs were hoping for their biggest takings of the year. During the first half, the mood was flat with many fans grumbling that the referee was letting Argentina get away with lots of fouls and no yellow cards.“If you foul Messi, you get a yellow card straight away. Argentina are scumbags,” one fan said.Pints of beer were piled up across tables. When Anthony Gordon scored after 55 minutes, the pub I was in went wild – everyone jumped up and screamed.Young couples embraced in kisses. Loud cheers followed whenever Argentina failed to score and the mood became upbeat. But when Argentina scored their first goal, the pub fell silent. Only the sole fan in an Argentinian shirt looked smug. The men groaned and put their arms behind their heads.The rest of the game, fans watched in silence and no one was eating or drinking. “All we had to do was to hold out for 10 minutes,” one man said angrily after the Three Lions lost. TV screens came down and the pub I was in rapidly switched channels on the sole permanent screen. Another fan said: “After scoring a goal, we focused too much on defence. We weren’t in attack mode.”England head coach Thomas Tuchel’s second half substitutions when he took off the goal scorer and brought on defenders Ezri Konsa, Dan Burn and Nico O’Reilly are coming in for furious criticism. This was the third World Cup semi-final England has lost in a row. Tuchel had been brought in to get rid of England’s semifinal curse and defence-first football. “It made zero sense to me. Tactically it was astonishing, to be perfectly honest,” said former England captain Gary Lineker on ‘The Rest is Football’ podcast.Former England captain Wayne Rooney launched a scathing attack on Tuchel’s gamble. “When we got the first goal, we didn’t look to go and try and score a second goal. Far from it… the gamble Tuchel made was to go with five at the back, which allowed them to dictate the game. Then we couldn’t get out…..The decisions Thomas Tuchel made, we have to be honest on this, have cost us tonight,” he said, “Tuchel has previously... had the bravery to switch things around. But here the head coach appeared as frozen as his players, bringing on Burn and O’Reilly instead of ripping up the script to introduce some of the attacking alternatives when it was clear the tide was not turning,” football journalist Ron Walker wrote.As if to rub salt into England’s wounds, Argentina’s players unfurled a banner on the pitch with the message: “The Falklands are Argentinian” – even though political messaging is banned at matches. “The World Cup might not be ours, but the Falkland Islands definitely are,” a spokesperson for the UK prime minister said.
Article Summary: Three hours before the Argentina-England semi-final, pubs started to get packed with men and women in football shirts. Many were convinced it was England’s time and she would win. But some were anxious saying Egypt had been cheated in their match against Argentina when they had a second goal controversially disallowed.

Article Title: 'Hasn't scored in two games': India coach drops verdict on Rohit Sharma amid poor form
Article Text:
Rohit Sharma

ALSO READ:

India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak backed Rohit Sharma despite the opener's poor returns in the ongoing ODI series against England, saying there is no pressure on a player of his stature and that he could produce a different innings in the series decider at Lord's.Rohit's struggles were visible in the second ODI in Cardiff on Thursday, where England won by four wickets to level the three-match series 1-1. The opener never looked settled, scoring just 10 runs off 18 balls by the end of the Powerplay even as India raced to 61/1. He eventually made 26 off 47 balls before being dismissed while attempting a sweep against Will Jacks.Rohit has not enjoyed the best run in ODIs this year. In eight matches, he has managed only one half-century and is averaging 30.12. With speculation growing over whether the selectors could move on from the former India captain ahead of the 2027 ODI World Cup, Kotak was asked after the Cardiff defeat if Rohit's place could come under scrutiny after Sunday's final ODI."I don't think a player as big as Rohit can feel the pressure," Kotak said after the match."He's too good a player to feel that. Yes he hasn't scored in two games. I don't think that makes any difference.But today also it looked like he'll get a good innings but that's okay [that he didn't get a big score]."While Rohit found it difficult to get going, captain Shubman Gill made a quick start before falling for 31 off 30 balls. Virat Kohli also began positively, striking three boundaries in his first 11 deliveries as England's bowlers struggled with their lengths early on a pitch that offered some variable bounce.Kotak rejected the suggestion that Rohit was struggling and said the opener could bounce back in the final ODI at Lord's."On a [given] day, there are a lot of batters I have seen, they don't get that momentum what they are looking for, and that can happen," Kotak said."You might see [a] completely different innings from Rohit Sharma in Lord's. I wouldn't use the word struggling, but maybe the shots he normally plays on the up, which is because of the double bounce, probably he felt it was not comfortable."Shubman got a quick start, then Virat got a quick start, but he [Rohit] probably didn't get balls in his slot."You could definitely see a completely different innings from a player like Rohit and I have seen that happening to a lot of batters. So it's not just Rohit. I wouldn't use the word he was struggling."India looked set for a bigger total after reaching 178/3, with Kohli scoring 65 and Shreyas Iyer top-scoring with 66. However, the innings lost momentum after Kohli's dismissal as India slipped to 193/7 before finishing on 233.England chased down the target with four wickets in hand to level the three-match ODI series 1-1. The decider will be played at Lord's on Sunday.
Article Summary: India coach Sitanshu Kotak says there is no pressure on Rohit Sharma. Rohit has struggled in the ongoing ODI series against England. England won the second ODI in Cardiff by four wickets to level the series 1-1. The decider will be played at Lord's on Sunday.

Article Title: Viral 2021 tweet predicting Argentina vs Spain World Cup final resurfaces ahead of Messi vs Lamine Yamal clash
Article Text:
Argentina vs Pain World Cup final prediction (Getty Images)

What did the viral 2021 tweet about the 2026 World Cup actually say?

Did the 'time traveler' behind the tweet respond after Argentina reached the final?

How did Argentina and Spain qualify for the 2026 World Cup final?

What makes the Argentina vs Spain 2026 World Cup final even bigger than the prediction?

A five-year-old post on X has become one of the most talked-about storylines of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The tweet, posted by @actuallyimthe in July 2021, predicted that Argentina would beat Spain 3-2 in the 2026 World Cup final – an outcome that has now cleared its second-to-last hurdle. Argentina beat England 2-1 in Atlanta on Wednesday, with Lionel Messi assisting both goals as Enzo Fernandez and Lautaro Martinez scored late to complete the comeback. With both finalists confirmed, only the scoreline is left to decide.The post reads simply: "Argentina just beat Spain at the 2026 World Cup final, 3-2." At the time it was published, it barely registered. Nobody paid it much attention. It was just another random guess buried in the timeline. Then Spain beat France 2-0 in the semi-finals, confirming their place in Sunday's final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. That is when the internet went looking for it.The post has since accumulated over 151,000 likes and tens of thousands of reposts. Reactions ranged from genuine disbelief to dark humour. One user asked, "How did he know?" Another went straight for the jugular: "You tweeted this before World Cup 2022, who's your source please?" The user behind the account goes by "dilemma," has a profile photo of the Disney character Stitch, and joined Twitter in 2017, with the account seemingly dedicated to gaming content.Nothing about it screams prophet.But the internet does not care about context right now. It cares about the score.The user, who had last tweeted on December 12, 2025, returned after Argentina's win over England by replying to their own viral tweet with only a watch emoji. Their reply sparked a wave of reactions, with one user writing they hoped "the guy that made this tweet is still alive."The account also shared a screenshot of another earlier prediction - from the account Isaiah (@fcbfootballblog), posted on July 3, 2019 - which read: "39-year-old Messi to lift his second consecutive Cup in 2026, you heard it here first." Messi turns 39 on June 24. He is currently 39. The layers keep stacking.Some users have pushed back on the mystique. A more sceptical voice pointed out: "It's a bait account. They post hundreds of predictions of plausible events and whenever one of them happens in the future, they delete all the others so they appear to be some miraculous prediction god." That explanation is entirely possible. It also makes for a far less interesting Sunday.Argentina came into Wednesday's semi-final as defending champions, and delivered the kind of performance that has become their calling card at this tournament. England led through Anthony Gordon before Messi orchestrated a late turnaround, setting up Enzo Fernandez in the 85th minute and then crossing for Lautaro Martinez to head home the winner deep in stoppage time.It was the fourth straight knockout game in which Argentina survived a close call. Coach Lionel Scaloni said afterwards: "I think that this team plays the best when we are facing a difficult situation, with adversity. We had a challenging game, a challenging situation. There was blood in the water, and we went for it."Spain's route to the final was less dramatic but no less convincing. They beat France 2-0 in the other semi-final, with Marc Cucurella solid at the back and Luis de la Fuente's side controlling proceedings from start to finish. It will be their second World Cup final appearance, having won the trophy once before, in South Africa in 2010.The final at MetLife Stadium on Sunday carries storylines that go well beyond a viral tweet. Messi, 39, faces Spain's 18-year-old phenom Lamine Yamal in what may be one of the most generationally loaded World Cup finals in memory. There is also a now-famous photograph of Messi cradling a six-month-old baby Yamal at a UNICEF event in 2007 - a picture that has circulated widely this tournament, framing the final as something almost scripted.Argentina enter Sunday as underdogs, priced at +125 to lift the trophy, with Spain favoured at -175. That is a slight shift from where the tournament began, where Spain were considered one of the stronger sides from the outset.Whether @actuallyimthe turns out to be a lucky guesser, a shrewd football analyst, or something the internet will insist was a time traveller, the 2026 World Cup final now has a subplot that few tournaments can match. A five-word tweet from 2021 might just become football's most unlikely prophecy. Or it might not. That is what Sunday is for.
Article Summary: A five-year-old tweet has become one of the most talked-about storylines of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The tweet, posted by @actuallyimthe in July 2021, predicted that Argentina would beat Spain 3-2. Argentina beat England 2-1 in Atlanta on Wednesday, with Lionel Messi assisting both goals. The post has since accumulated over 151,000 likes and tens of thousands of reposts.

Article Title: "That roast was brutal": Hilarious jab at Jake Paul at the ESPYs leaves fans in a frenzy
Article Text:
Jake ​Paul. Image via: Megan Briggs/ Getty Images​

Jake Paul gets hilariously roasted at the ESPYs

Fans react to Mercello Hernández's Jake Paul roast

Jake Paul admits fighting Anthony Joshua was a mistake

Jake Paul hints at next opponent

Mercello Hernández didn't need long to find his target at the 2026 ESPYs. During a nearly 10-minute opening monologue, the 28-year-old comedian turned his sights on Jake Paul 's well-documented pattern of fighting opponents well past their prime, drawing one of the biggest reactions of the night.Hernández, hosting the ceremony in New York, spent the monologue working through a list of recent sports headlines, including Tiger Woods' DUI incident and callbacks to previous host Shane Gillis. But it was the Paul material that landed hardest with the crowd.Hernández built the joke around Paul's tendency to fight aging boxers, framing it as a mock warning before turning the bit on his own family. He opened with a backhanded compliment about the night's guest list, then pivoted straight into the setup. "Jake, that's just a joke. Don't fight me," Hernández said, before delivering the punchline aimed at his own relatives.Rather than reacting poorly, Paul appeared to take the joke in stride, laughing through the segment rather than pushing back, according to the brief's account of the broadcast.The joke spread quickly online. One fan account, @Mufcmilitant1, posted that the ESPYs "really don't hold back" and that Paul "walked right into that one."Another user, @Vision33X, joked that Paul's fight resume "reads like an aarp newsletter."@Sionainnagins piled on with a bit about Paul "collecting father figures like Pokémon cards."Not every reaction focused purely on comedy. @SwaydayWrestlin referenced the toll of Paul's fight with Anthony Joshua, writing that Joshua "rearranged his entire smile" and questioning how the bout was sanctioned in the first place.@agentmma summed up the moment bluntly, saying Paul "got cooked in front of everybody, no comeback to that one."The Joshua fight has loomed over Paul's career since it broke his jaw last December, sidelining him from fighting or sparring since. Speaking with Pat McAfee, Paul confirmed he's still working his way back and expects to be cleared to spar soon.He acknowledged the Joshua matchup was a step too far, saying his focus going forward will be different. "I just probably won't fight Olympic gold medal heavyweights anymore," Paul said, adding that he's already in talks with multiple potential opponents.Among the names Paul floated is Brock Lesnar, who turns 49 this year and hasn't recorded a competitive MMA win since 2010. Paul pointed to his own wrestling background as justification for the matchup, saying he wrestled Division I in Ohio. A rematch scenario with Nate Diaz, whom Paul beat by boxing decision in August 2023, also remains on the table according to Paul's comments.Whether either fight materializes remains unclear, but for now, Paul's résumé of opponents well beyond their athletic peak continues to follow him, punchlines and all.
Article Summary: Mercello Hernández roasted Jake Paul at the 2026 ESPYs. The comedian focused on Paul's history of fighting opponents well past their prime. Paul appeared to take the joke in stride, laughing through the segment. The joke was one of the biggest reactions of the night.

Article Title: 'Was really struggling': England's Jude Bellingham opens up after 1-2 defeat against Argentina
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham urges England fans to stay united (Image: X

Argentina reach back-to-back FIFA World Cup Final

England and Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham has broken his silence following England's heartbreaking 2-1 defeat to Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal, urging supporters to remain united despite the disappointment. Bellingham enjoyed an outstanding World Cup campaign, finishing as England's top scorer with six goals and one assist. However, he was unable to add to his tally in the semifinal as the Three Lions suffered another painful exit.Reflecting on the defeat in an emotional Instagram post, the 23-year-old thanked fans for their unwavering support and called on the nation to carry forward the unity shown throughout the tournament."Was really struggling to find the right words for yesterday and the last few weeks but this pretty much hits the nail on the head from our driver in Kansas. Thank you for the unbelievable support from back home and to those who spent their hard earned money to travel to America and get behind us. Don't let the unity and love we've seen in our country end with this campaign. When we're together we can achieve big things... And we will! Love yous!" Bellingham wrote.Argentina defeated England 2-1 in a dramatic FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Lionel Messi orchestrated a stunning late comeback with two critical assists, shattering England's dreams of reaching their first World Cup final since 1966.After a fiercely contested and goalless first half, England took the lead in the 55th minute when Anthony Gordon finished off a Morgan Rogers cross following good build-up play from Harry Kane. However, Thomas Tuchel's decision to switch to a defensive five-man backline invited sustained Argentine pressure. Lionel Messi punished England's retreat by setting up Enzo Fernández for a stunning long-range equaliser in the 85th minute before producing another moment of brilliance in stoppage time, delivering a pinpoint cross for Lautaro Martínez to head home the winner after Alexis Mac Allister's shot struck the post, completing Argentina's dramatic 2-1 comeback.
Article Summary: England lost 2-1 to Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal. Lionel Messi orchestrated a stunning late comeback with two critical assists. Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham thanked fans for their unwavering support. Bellingham enjoyed an outstanding World Cup campaign, finishing as England's top scorer with six goals.

Article Title: Rift between Virat Kohli and Gautam Gambhir? India coach gives blunt 'no bridge needed' response on speculation
Article Text:
Virat Kohli and head coach Gautam Gambhir,

India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak has dismissed speculation of a rift between Virat Kohli and head coach Gautam Gambhir , saying the two are in regular communication and that there is no issue in their working relationship.Rumours about Kohli and Gambhir's equation gained momentum on social media after visuals from India's training sessions during the ODI series against England showed the two not interacting. The speculation has continued ever since Kohli announced his retirement from Test cricket last year.Ahead of the first ODI at Edgbaston, Kohli was seen batting in the nets while Gambhir watched from close range without speaking to him. Kotak, meanwhile, was spotted having a conversation with the former India captain, adding to the online discussion.However, Kotak made it clear there was nothing unusual about the situation and laughed off suggestions that someone needed to act as a bridge between the two."No (laughs), Virat and Gautam would've spoken about 10 times today. I don't think that needs any bridge," Kotak said.He also explained what he and Kohli had discussed during the practice session before the opening ODI."Basically before he went out to bat, he spoke a few things to me. Honestly as a batting coach, unless he feels something or spots something major, his batting shouldn't be disturbed and he shouldn't be told much. But he asked me certain things before regarding his footwork and after the nets, he was talking [to me]."Apart from that, I don't know where the rumours come from, but they do," Kotak said.Kotak also backed Rohit Sharma , who has struggled for runs in the ongoing ODI series against England.Rohit's difficulties continued in the second ODI in Cardiff on Thursday, where England won by four wickets to level the three-match series 1-1. The opener managed just 10 runs off 18 balls in the Powerplay despite India reaching 61/1, before being dismissed for 26 off 47 balls while attempting a sweep against Will Jacks.Rohit has not enjoyed the best run in ODIs this year. In eight matches, he has scored only one half-century and averages 30.12. With speculation over whether the selectors could move on from the former India captain ahead of the 2027 ODI World Cup, Kotak was asked if Rohit's place would come under scrutiny after Sunday's series decider at Lord's.The batting coach said there was no pressure on the veteran opener."I don't think a player as big as Rohit can feel the pressure," Kotak said after the Cardiff match."He's too good a player to feel that. Yes he hasn't scored in two games. I don't think that makes any difference. But today also it looked like he'll get a good innings but that's okay [that he didn't get a big score]."
Article Summary: India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak has dismissed speculation of a rift between Virat Kohli and head coach Gautam Gambhir. Kotak said the two are in regular communication and that there is no issue in their working relationship.

Article Title: Heartbroken Harry Kane vows England will 'go again' after FIFA World Cup exit
Article Text:
England's Harry Kane (AP Photo/Lynne Sladky)

Argentina into the finals

England captain Harry Kane has shared an emotional message for the Three Lions' supporters following the team's heartbreaking exit from the FIFA World Cup 2026 at the hands of Argentina in the semifinals. Kane enjoyed an impressive tournament, finishing with six goals and one assist in seven matches. Despite his prolific campaign, the 32-year-old admitted he was devastated after England narrowly missed out on another World Cup finaIn a heartfelt post on X on Friday, Kane described the defeat as one of the toughest moments of his career, saying England had come agonisingly close but ultimately fell short despite giving everything throughout the seven-week campaign. Notably, England reached the quarterfinals at the 2022 FIFA World Cup after finishing fourth in 2018, before progressing to the semifinals in the 2026 edition."No words are big enough right now to overcome this empty feeling in the stomach. We were close, really close to another final but it wasn’t enough. We’ve given everything over these last 7 weeks and to fall short is hard to take! I know the expectations are high and rightly so.We’ve been knocking on the door for eight years now but again are missing that final piece of the jigsaw. That’s where we have to go away, process it and find a way to get better. I’m so proud of the boys and what we have shown throughout this tournament—some tough games and tough environments that we have overcome.Some memories will stay with us players, and I’m sure with you fans, for a long, long time. Going for glory doesn’t always mean you will get it. You have to fight for it, get knocked down, pick yourself up and go again, and that’s what we will do. There’s no other way but to keep believing and keep pushing. Thank you to every single fan who travelled and supported us in the stadiums. Thank you to everyone back home for believing in us. Thank you to the players and staff for everything you have given. As always, win or lose, we learn and go again," Harry Kane wrote on X.Argentina defeated England 2-1 in a dramatic FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Lionel Messi orchestrated a stunning late comeback with two critical assists, shattering England's dreams of reaching their first World Cup final since 1966.
Article Summary: England captain Harry Kane has shared an emotional message for the Three Lions' supporters following the team's heartbreaking exit from the FIFA World Cup 2026. Kane enjoyed an impressive tournament, finishing with six goals and one assist in seven matches. The 32-year-old admitted he was devastated after England narrowly missed out on another World Cup fina.

Article Title: Sold for $4.9 million, Pele's 1958 FIFA World Cup final shirt becomes second-most expensive football jersey; which is first?
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

The No. 10 jersey worn by Brazil great Pelé in the 1958 FIFA World Cup final has been sold for $4.9 million, auction house Sotheby's said on Thursday.Pelé, who died in 2022, was just 17 years old when he scored twice in Brazil's 5-2 victory over hosts Sweden in the World Cup final at Rasunda Stadium. He remains the youngest player to score in a World Cup final.According to Sotheby's, the shirt is now the second-most expensive football jersey ever sold at auction. The most expensive remains Diego Maradona 's famous "Hand of God" jersey, which was sold for $9.3 million in 2022.The auction house also said the previous most valuable piece of Pelé memorabilia was a 1958 trading card that sold for $976,000 last month.After Brazil's World Cup triumph in 1958, Edson Arantes do Nascimento — better known as Pelé — gifted the handmade jersey to his roommate and Brazil teammate, Dida.The shirt stayed with Dida's family for decades before being displayed in a Brazilian museum. It was later acquired by a collector in 2004.Pelé remains the only player to win three FIFA World Cups, lifting the trophy with Brazil in 1958, 1962 and 1970.He scored six goals during the 1958 tournament, including two in the final against Sweden as Brazil won 5-2 to claim their first World Cup title.In the 1962 World Cup, Pelé scored one goal as Brazil retained the trophy with a 3-1 victory over Czechoslovakia in the final.He played another key role in Brazil's 1970 World Cup triumph, scoring the opening goal in the 4-1 win over Italy in the final. Pelé finished that tournament with four goals.The Brazilian football legend passed away in 2022 at the age of 82 following a battle with cancer.
Article Summary: Pelé, who died in 2022, was just 17 years old when he scored twice in Brazil's 5-2 victory over hosts Sweden in the World Cup final at Rasunda Stadium. The shirt is now the second-most expensive football jersey ever sold at auction. Diego Maradona's famous "Hand of God" jersey was sold for $9.3 million in 2022.

Article Title: Bills Trade Rumor: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked to $30 million Buffalo Bills WR
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked to $30 million Buffalo Bills WR(Getty Images)

Category



Details



Player



Josh Palmer



Current Team



Buffalo Bills



Potential Landing Spots



Dallas Cowboys, Kansas City Chiefs



Current Contract



3 years, $30 million



Latest Insider Update



Bleacher Report's Moe Moton linked Palmer to the Saints, while Last Word on Sports identified the Cowboys and Chiefs as realistic destinations if Buffalo moves him



Potential Return



Mid-to-late Day 3 draft pick or a depth player, depending on market interest.



2025 Production



22 receptions, 303 receiving yards, 0 touchdowns





Which teams are interested in the Bills wide receiver?



What are insiders saying about the Bills trade rumor ?



Contract details and implications

Why could the Dallas Cowboys or the Kansas City Chiefs be the right fit?



The latest NFL trade rumors have put a spotlight on one of Buffalo's veteran wide receivers ahead of training camp. While the Bills have not indicated they are actively shopping the receiver, recent speculation suggests he could become available if the team decides to reshape its wide receiver room. Among the teams linked as possible landing spots are the Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs, both of whom could benefit from adding another experienced pass catcher before the 2026 season.The latest NFL trade rumors began after Bleacher Report's Moe Moton suggested the New Orleans Saints could have interest in Josh Palmer because of his previous connection with head coach Kellen Moore. However, Last Word on Sports expanded on that idea and identified the Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs as two l teams that could make sense if Buffalo decides to move the veteran.Neither team has made an official offer, and there is no indication that a trade is close. Still, both clubs have reasons to monitor Buffalo's receiver situation as training camp approaches.Moe Moton believes the Saints could consider Palmer because Kellen Moore coached with the Chargers during Palmer's time in Los Angeles. Even so, Moton questioned whether New Orleans would give up draft capital for a receiver coming off a quiet season.Last Word on Sports took the discussion further by naming the Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs as potential landing spots if Palmer becomes expendable.The Cowboys are looking for more depth behind CeeDee Lamb and George Pickens, while the Chiefs continue searching for reliable receiving options around Patrick Mahomes. Palmer's experience and ability to play multiple receiver spots could make him an attractive option for either contender.Josh Palmer is under contract with the Buffalo Bills through the 2027 season after signing a three-year, $30 million deal in free agency. The contract included an $8 million signing bonus and $18 million in guaranteed money, making him one of Buffalo's notable offseason additions.In 2026, Palmer is set to earn a $9.66 million base salary along with a $250,000 workout bonus while carrying an $11.75 million cap hit. The contract also includes a potential out after the 2026 season, when the Buffalo Bills could move on with approximately $4.8 million in dead cap. That flexibility has fueled speculation that the Bills could consider trade options if younger receivers establish themselves during camp.The Dallas Cowboys have invested heavily in their passing attack, but adding another experienced receiver could strengthen the depth chart for Dak Prescott. Palmer has proven he can line up inside or outside and could provide another dependable target if injuries become an issue during the season.The Kansas City Chiefs also remain a logical fit. Patrick Mahomes has consistently benefited from veteran receivers who understand different route concepts and can contribute immediately. Palmer may not be the primary target in Kansas City, but he could add experience to a receiver room that continues to evolve.For Buffalo, any decision will likely depend on how the receiver competition unfolds during training camp. Palmer remains under contract, and the Bills are under no pressure to move him. Still, if the front office decides to create more opportunities for younger players, this Bills trade rumor involving the Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs will be one to watch in the weeks leading up to the regular season.
Article Summary: Josh Palmer is under contract with the Buffalo Bills through the 2027 season after signing a three-year, $30 million deal in free agency. Palmer is set to earn a $9.66 million base salary along with a $250,000 workout bonus while carrying an $11.75 million cap hit. The Cowboys are looking for more depth behind CeeDee Lamb and George Pickens while the Chiefs continue searching for reliable receiving options around Patrick Mahomes.

Article Title: Meet the 8 new Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders rookies who are ready to become “America’s Sweethearts”
Article Text:
Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders rookies for 2026-27 season (Netflix)

Meet the 2026-27 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders rookies

1.

Savanna Dastrup

2.

Emily Awbrey

3. Amiyah Naulls

4. Haley Bogdon

5. Lexi Smith

6. Aubrey Rogers

7. Brianne Lindenau

8. Kate Rogge

The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders officially unveiled their 2026-27 roster in mid-July 2026, and eight new faces have earned their stars. The announcement came via the team's official Instagram with the caption, "Officially earned their stars. Introducing your 2026-2027 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders!" Since Netflix's *America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders* debuted in June 2024, the audition process has become must-watch content. Some of this year's rookies tried and failed before. Others are fresh arrivals. All eight have one thing in common: they made it.Yes, and for fans of Season 3, this one hits differently. Dastrup had been working toward this dream for years. She made it to training camp for the 2025-26 squad, only to be cut before the final roster was set.What made her story stand out was what happened after. She went directly to DCC director Kelli Finglass and head choreographer Judy Trammell and asked them straight: did she have a real shot if she came back? Finglass didn't sugarcoat it but didn't shut the door either. "You might just chalk this up to timing and experience and the pressure," Finglass told her."But I think you've got the skills to make this team or another team. "Dastrup, a Utah native and former Texas Christian University cheerleader, took that as a green light. She returned in 2026 and made the squad. Her reaction on Instagram said everything: "This is an absolute dream come true!! I am so excited and am so so grateful for this opportunity!!! go cowboys!! 🥹💙🌟."Emily Awbrey had all the technical credentials when she first auditioned in 2025. Finglass called her "one of the strongest dance technicians in the entire audition." And yet, she was cut.The Oregon native's background was in cruise ship performances, which gave her strong fundamentals but left her adjusting to the pom-style dance that defines DCC. Finglass was honest: she was a personal favorite, but the style hadn't clicked yet. "I hope you do consider re-auditioning," Finglass told her, adding she would be "disappointed if you don't try out again."Awbrey promised she'd be back. She was. This time, she made it through training camp and onto the final roster. Her Instagram reaction? "I'm genuinely speechless. No words can describe this 💙."Amiyah Naulls comes in with strong collegiate credentials. She was part of the dance team at California State University, Fullerton, and also completed one of DCC's Prep Intensives before her audition. While working toward her degree, she has been teaching dance on the side.Making the squad clearly meant a great deal. "Like someone pinch me!! What an honor!! 🥹❤️," she wrote on Instagram after the roster was announced.Bogdon brings a somewhat unexpected combination to the squad. She graduated from the University of Arkansas in December 2025, where she was both a dance team member and sorority participant. She is also a registered nurse.After making the 2026-27 team, she shared the DCC announcement on her Instagram Stories: "I can't believe I'm a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader!!!!! I am so honored and grateful to be living my dream."Lexi Smith joins the squad fresh from the University of Central Florida, where she was part of the cheer team. The timing here is remarkable: she graduated just two months before landing a spot on one of the most recognized cheer squads in the world.She described the moment on her Instagram Stories as feeling "beyond blessed."Rogers is making a league switch that very few people can claim. The Santa Clarita, California native previously cheered for the Los Angeles Lakers before transitioning to the NFL with the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.Her reaction to making the squad was short and to the point: "Is this REAL LIFE?!"Lindenau tried out in 2025 and didn't make it. Rather than walk away, she went through a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders Prep Intensive and returned with a clearer focus. The University of Arizona alumna had been open about her first attempt on social media, writing that while she didn't get the outcome she wanted, she was grateful for the experience and committed to coming back stronger.She did. After making the 2026-27 roster, she posted on her Instagram Stories: "someone pinch me!!!!!" and called it a "dream come true."Rogge rounds out the rookie class. An Austin native, she cheered and performed as a pom dancer at the University of Texas at Austin before first trying out for DCC in 2025. Like several of her new teammates, she returned in 2026 and made the final cut.She celebrated on her Instagram Stories: "A dream come true! So grateful & excited for the year ahead with these amazing girls! Thank you Jesus!!!!!"
Article Summary: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders officially unveiled their 2026-27 roster in mid- July 2026. The eight new faces have earned their stars. Some of this year's rookies tried and failed before, while others are fresh arrivals. All eight have one thing in common: They made it.

Article Title: Clavicular pushes back after AOC warns of ‘rabbit holes’ tied to growing looksmaxxing culture
Article Text:
Clavicular pushes back after AOC warns of ‘rabbit holes’ tied to growing looksmaxxing culture (Image via Getty)

Clavicular pushes back on Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s comments about looksmaxxing

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says young men also face growing appearance pressures

Looksmaxxing streamer Clavicular has responded after U.S. Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, better known as AOC, shared concerns about the growing looksmaxxing trend and its impact on young men. The exchange started after AOC was asked about Clavicular and the online movement during a conversation with TMZ on Capitol Hill. While the congresswoman said her concern was less about Clavicular personally and more about the messages young people receive online, the 20-year-old streamer disagreed with how the trend was being described. He later took to X to explain his position and defend what he believes looksmaxxing is really about.AOC was approached by a TMZ correspondent on Capitol Hill on July 14 and asked about Clavicular and the broader discussion around looksmaxxing. During the conversation, she spoke about the pressures many young people face regarding appearance and self-worth.The congresswoman said:“I think to me it’s less about him himself as a person I think it’s about what leads young men to go down these kinds of rabbit holes. I think as a woman, when we’ve been teenagers, we’re constantly being told that our bodies are not good enough and that you’re either ‘too big,’ or ‘too small,’ or ‘too tall.’Everyone’s trying to nip this and tuck that, and it’s all because of the messages that we’re told about our worth.”Her remarks focused on the wider culture surrounding appearance rather than on Clavicular himself. The comments quickly became part of a larger discussion online about self-improvement content and the influence it can have on younger audiences.A day later, Clavicular responded on X. The streamer argued that looksmaxxing is often misunderstood and said it is not only about physical appearance.He wrote:“Why do people act like you automatically reject the importance of charisma/personality when becoming a looksmaxer. Its always been about being as well rounded as possible and maxing every stat.”Through that post, Clavicular pushed back against the idea that looksmaxxing ignores personality or character. Instead, he described it as an effort to improve different parts of a person’s life.AOC, however, said she worries that the same appearance-based pressures long experienced by women could increasingly affect young men as well.She added:“I think that it’s bad enough that women get that, and I don’t want to see that extended to young men either because at the end of the day … there’s always going to be something. We really need role models of people who love themselves.”The comments from both figures highlight two different views in an ongoing debate. While Clavicular argues that looksmaxxing is about becoming more well-rounded, AOC’s concern centers on the pressure young people may feel when their value becomes tied to appearance. The discussion continues as conversations around self-image, confidence and online influence reach a wider audience.
Article Summary: Clavicular responds after AOC warns of 'rabbit holes' tied to looksmaxxing culture. AOC was asked about Clavicular and the online movement during a conversation with TMZ on Capitol Hill. The 20-year-old streamer disagreed with how the trend was being described.

Article Title: Surprising details emerge as Caitlin Clark-Alyssa Thomas controversy reportedly prompts Adam Silver's intervention
Article Text:
Alyssa Thomas and Caitlin Clark. Image via: AP Photo

New report suggests Adam Silver's intervention led to Alyssa Thomas' suspension

What happened between Caitlin Clark and Alyssa Thomas

What was the WNBA's reaction?

Caitlin Clark. Image via: AP

A new Sports Business Journal report claims NBA commissioner Adam Silver had to intervene before WNBA commissioner Cathy Engelbert suspended Alyssa Thomas for hitting Caitlin Clark in the throat during a June 24 game between the Phoenix Mercury and Indiana Fever.According to the report, Engelbert was initially reluctant to discipline Thomas, believing a suspension for a play that drew no foul call on the court would be too severe. The claim matters because it raises fresh questions about how the WNBA protects its most visible player and whether Engelbert's leadership is facing its most serious test yet. Sports Business Journal reported that Silver told Engelbert he saw clear evidence of a flagrant foul and pushed her to issue punishment , reportedly saying he felt for Clark given the situation. Engelbert ultimately suspended Thomas for one game and applied a Flagrant 2 penalty carrying a $1,000 fine.A WNBA spokesperson disputed the account, calling it "absolutely false." Sources close to Engelbert told the outlet that league referee and basketball operations staff routinely weigh in on potential flagrant calls, suggesting the process followed normal channels rather than outside pressure.The incident occurred June 24 when Thomas struck Clark in the throat during live play, an action that went unpenalized in the moment.The league's subsequent review resulted in the suspension days later. Thomas has said she received death threats following the foul, while Clark has publicly said the league needs to do more to protect its players both on and off the court.The controversy has added to mounting pressure on Engelbert, who has led the league since 2019. A group of 11 Republican lawmakers wrote to her demanding accountability for what they described as repeated physical attacks on Clark, arguing the league's biggest star deserves better protection. Engelbert also faced criticism after backing out of a scheduled interview on "The Dan Patrick Show," with Patrick saying his team waited nearly two hours before receiving what he called a weak response from the league.Asked directly about Engelbert's future during an NBA Summer League press conference, Silver praised her, saying, "I think Cathy continues to do a strong job building that league," while also acknowledging, "we'll have ongoing discussions about what the future looks like." Separately, reporting has surfaced claims from an anonymous league insider alleging that resentment toward Clark's popularity, including racially charged sentiment among some players, has contributed to the tension, though the WNBA has not confirmed those characterizations.Whether this episode becomes a turning point for Engelbert's tenure or simply another flashpoint in a season already defined by scrutiny over player safety remains to be seen, and Silver's comments suggest even the NBA is watching closely.
Article Summary: New report suggests Adam Silver's intervention led to Alyssa Thomas' suspension. Thomas struck Caitlin Clark in the throat during a June 24 game between the Phoenix Mercury and Indiana Fever. The claim matters because it raises fresh questions about how the WNBA protects its most visible player.

Article Title: Roger Federer and Mirka Federer’s Children: All About Myla, Charlene, Leo and Lenny
Article Text:
Roger Federer and Mirka Federer’s Children: All About Myla, Charlene, Leo and Lenny (Image via Getty)

Roger Federer and Mirka Federer welcomed twin daughters Myla Rose and Charlene Riva in 2009

The New York Times

PEOPLE

Myla Rose Federer and Charlene Riva Federer regularly supported Roger Federer during tournaments

PEOPLE

Leo Federer is becoming more serious about tennis, says Roger Federer

Today

Lenny Federer prefers creative interests while Leo Federer follows sport

PEOPLE

Roger Federer may be one of the greatest tennis players ever, but at home, he is focused on being a father. The 20-time Grand Slam champion and his wife, Mirka Federer, are raising four children, twin daughters Myla Rose and Charlene Riva, and twin sons Leo and Lenny. Since retiring in 2022, Federer has been spending far more time with his family and helping guide his children through their teenage years. While sports remain a big part of family life, Federer has made it clear that he has never pressured any of his children to follow his path in tennis.Roger and Mirka became parents for the first time on July 23, 2009, when identical twins Myla Rose Federer and Charlene Riva Federer were born.At the time, Federer shared his happiness in a statement, saying, “This is the greatest day of our lives. Mirka, Myla and Charlene are all healthy and doing very well.”The tennis star had kept the fact that they were expecting twins private before the birth. Speaking to, Federer later admitted it was difficult not to reveal the surprise.After becoming a father, he toldthat he wanted to be involved in every part of his daughters’ early years.“It’s been a lot of fun being a father and spending time with them,” Federer said. “I’m hands-on as much as I can because every day is something new and something different. I don’t want to miss anything.”He added, “It’s an amazing feeling to be called a dad. I take a lot of pride in that title.”As children, Myla and Charlene were often seen in the stands cheering for their father at major tournaments, including Wimbledon.Life looks different now that Federer has stepped away from professional tennis. Instead of spending months on tour, he is enjoying everyday family moments with his daughters.In a 2024 interview with, Federer explained why being present during this stage of their lives matters so much to him.“I feel like it’s a very vital time to be around them and to help them, guide them, and obviously, let them also fly on their own,” he said.The family also spends time together outside sports. Federer revealed that he has taken his children to concerts by artists including Bruce Springsteen, Elton John and Taylor Swift.Roger and Mirka expanded their family on May 6, 2014, when another set of identical twins arrived — Leo Federer and Lenny Federer.Like their older sisters, the boys regularly attended their father’s matches. One of the most memorable moments came after Federer won his eighth Wimbledon singles title in 2017.Speaking on, Federer recalled looking into the crowd and seeing his family.“I was just so deeply touched by my performance in the tournament from the beginning to the end,” he said. “I looked up in the stands and saw my kids … then it started to sink in that I was a Wimbledon champion for real.”Federer added, “I saw the boys for the first time, and [seeing] them coming out to centre court and knowing how much center court means to me, and seeing them like not knowing what’s going on. And then the girls were there too, and my wife was emotional. It just really hit me.”Although all four children play different sports, Federer has never tried to push tennis on them.Speaking toin 2024, he said, “They do play tennis, and we ski, and we’re all learning to golf. We recently tried scuba diving. But the girls were never passionate about tennis, and I was relieved about it.”He then shared a glimpse into the personalities of his sons.“The boys love their soccer. Leo is starting to show interest in getting serious about tennis. Lenny is much more creative, he’s very into drawing, reading.”For now, Federer appears happy letting his children discover their own interests. Whether that leads to tennis courts, football fields or creative pursuits, the former world No. 1 has made it clear that family comes first.
Article Summary: Roger Federer and his wife, Mirka Federer, have four children: twin daughters Myla Rose and Charlene Riva, and twin sons Leo and Lenny. The former world No. 1 has made it clear that he has never pressured any of his children to follow his path in tennis.

Article Title: ESPYs host Marcello Hernandez revives Tiger Woods controversy with brutal ‘Grand Theft Auto’ punchline
Article Text:
ESPYs host Marcello Hernandez revives Tiger Woods controversy with brutal ‘Grand Theft Auto’ punchline (Image via Getty)

Saturday Night Live

Marcello Hernandez jokes about Tiger Woods’ DUI case during ESPYs monologue

Madden

Bill Belichick and Jordon Hudson relationship becomes another target

The 2026 ESPY Awards opened with plenty of laughs, but host Marcello Hernandez also delivered some of the night’s most talked-about moments. Thecomedian took aim at several major sports figures during his opening monologue in New York on Wednesday, including golf legend Tiger Woods and former NFL coach Bill Belichick. Speaking in front of athletes, celebrities and sports executives, Hernandez mixed sports humor with personal jabs, drawing loud reactions from the audience. His comments about Woods’ recent DUI case and Belichick’s relationship with Jordon Hudson quickly stood out as the biggest talking points of the night.While congratulating Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams on appearing on the cover of the popular football video game, Hernandez suddenly turned his attention to Woods.“And Tiger Woods will be on the cover of Grand Theft Auto.”The joke immediately drew laughs from the crowd. Hernandez then added:“I love you Tiger, I’m a big fan. It was just written so well.”The comment referenced Woods’ DUI case earlier this year. According to reports, the 15-time major champion was arrested in March after a crash near his Jupiter Island home. Woods later pleaded not guilty. Reports also said he passed a breathalyzer test, though police found two hydrocodone pills in his pocket and said he declined to provide a urine sample.After the incident, Woods entered a rehabilitation facility in Switzerland to help manage his medications.He later returned to the United States in June. His next court hearing is scheduled for August 4.The golfer has gradually returned to public appearances in recent weeks. In late June, he attended a PGA Tour press conference in Connecticut, where he voiced support for planned changes to the tour’s season structure beginning in 2028.Later in the monologue, Hernandez shifted his focus to Belichick and his relationship with 25-year-old Jordon Hudson.“The Knicks won their first championship since 1973,” he said before adding, “just to put into perspective how long ago that was, in 1973 hockey players didn’t wear helmets, basketball had no three-point line… and in 1973 Bill Belichick was the age his girlfriend is now.”The joke was another reference to the age gap between Belichick, 74, and Hudson. Their relationship has frequently been discussed since they went public as a couple in 2024.The ESPYs have featured similar humor before. During the 2025 ceremony, comedian Shane Gillis also joked about Belichick and Hudson while discussing baseball star Shohei Ohtani.‘“Bookie” is what Bill Belichick reads to his girlfriend before bedtime,’ Gillis said during last year’s event.Hernandez’s monologue also included jokes about the WNBA, Jake Paul, Jalen Brunson and American sports fans. One notable omission was any mention of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, whose recent wedding has dominated entertainment and sports headlines.The ESPY Awards honor the biggest individual and team achievements in sports each year. While recent ceremonies have been hosted by athletes such as Serena Williams and Steph Curry, this year’s event handed the microphone to Hernandez, whose opening remarks ensured the ceremony started with plenty of attention.
Article Summary: ESPYs host Marcello Hernandez revives Tiger Woods controversy with brutal ‘Grand Theft Auto’ punchline. Later in the monologue, Hernandez shifted his focus to Belichick and his relationship with 25-year-old Jordon Hudson. Hernandez also included jokes about the WNBA, Jake Paul, Jalen Brunson and American sports fans.

Article Title: Is Fortnite down (July 16, 2026)? v41.20 update server maintenance details
Article Text:
Image via Fortnite

When will Fortnite server maintenance end (July 16, 2026)?



Downtime schedule by region



Americas

Pacific Time (PDT): 1:00 AM, July 16

Mountain Time (MDT): 2:00 AM, July 16

Central Time (CDT): 3:00 AM, July 16

Eastern Time (EDT): 4:00 AM, July 16

Europe

British Summer Time (BST): 9:00 AM, July 16

Central European Summer Time (CEST): 10:00 AM, July 16

Asia & Pacific

India Standard Time (IST): 1:30 PM, July 16

Singapore / China (SGT/CST): 4:00 PM, July 16

Japan Standard Time (JST): 5:00 PM, July 16

Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST): 6:00 PM, July 16

What's coming in the v41.20 update?



DC Hot Bat Summer Event

The 41.20 update introduces the DC Hot Bat Summer event with new summer-style skins for DC characters including Summer Batman, Summer Harley Quinn, Summer Catwoman, and Summer Poison Ivy. The cosmetics are expected to be split across two bundles, i.e., the Gotham City Summer Bundle and a High Tide Harley and Sunflower Ivy Bundle.

New Sprites: Batman, Air, and Seven

The Batman Sprite is one of the biggest gameplay additions in the v41.20 update patch notes. Unlike the Summer Batman Outfit, the Batman Sprite is an item found during Battle Royale and Zero Build matches and will enter the loot pool as soon as downtime ends. Its ability hasn't been officially confirmed yet.

The Air Sprite is another key addition, focusing on movement, and it increases sprint speed and jump height while preventing fall damage, making it useful for crossing the map, escaping the Storm, reaching rooftops, and attacking from unexpected angles. The Seven Sprite gives players and their squad a new tracking ability, revealing foot trails left behind by enemy players.

More collaborations on the way

The Fortnite 41.20 update also brings a David Beckham collab, featuring unique skins based on his iconic number 7 jersey and another in a suit inspired by his Inter Miami club. Leakers suggest the skin will arrive later this week. New cosmetics tied to The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants and Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey are also being added with the update.

Shiny Hours event

Epic has announced the Shiny Hours event, taking place on July 18, 2026 at 2 PM ET and 9 PM ET, which will boost spawn rates for Special Sprite variants during the sessions. If your Sprite Checklist still has gaps, that's the window to target.

The Fortnite v41.20 update is going live on July 16, 2026, at 4 AM ET, bringing the DC Hot Bat Summer event, new Sprites, and a host of other content additions to Chapter 7 Season 3. As part of the release, the servers of the game will be taken down for maintenance, during which you will not be able to access the different modes.If you're hitting connection errors or a loading screen that won't move, you're not alone. Article Title: Quote of the day by Heraclitus: 'No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man' and a lesson on how change is the only constant
Article Text:
Quote of the by Greek philosopher Heraclitus on change.

"No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man,"

Nothing remains fixed: not the world around us, not the people we meet, and not even our own thoughts, emotions, or identities.

Metaphor of river

Change is the only constant: in relationships, in society

Practice mindfulness

If everything changes, how can we still recognize anything as the same? Why do we still call it the same river?

Quote of the day: Heraclitus was a Greek philosopher who lived around 500 BCE in the city of Ephesus. Unlike philosophers who searched for stability or permanence, Heraclitus believed that the universe is defined by continuous motion. He is often associated with the phrase panta rhei "everything flows" although those exact words do not appear in his surviving writings. His philosophy revolved around the idea that reality is like a river: always moving, always transforming. To him, fire symbolized this eternal process of change because fire is never static; it exists only by constantly consuming and transforming what it touches.His famous saying,is one of the most enduring observations in the history of philosophy. Though only a single sentence, it captures a profound truth about life: everything is in a constant state of change.The quote is not merely about rivers. It is about existence itself. Heraclitus invites us to recognize that permanence is an illusion and that change is the only true constant.The river in Heraclitus' quote is a powerful metaphor because a river appears to be the same from day to day. We call it by the same name, we recognize its banks, and we think of it as a permanent feature of the landscape. Yet the water flowing through it is never the same. Every second, new water replaces the old. The river's depth changes with rainfall, its current shifts, sediment is carried downstream, fish migrate, plants grow along its banks, and erosion subtly reshapes its course. The river preserves its identity while constantly changing its substance.Human beings are much the same. We think of ourselves as the same person we were five or ten years ago because we retain our name, memories, and sense of identity. But in reality, we are constantly changing. Our bodies replace cells, our experiences alter our beliefs, our relationships reshape our personalities, and our successes and failures influence our outlook on life. Even if we return to the exact same place years later, we experience it differently because we ourselves are no longer the person who first stood there.Picture someone revisiting their childhood home after twenty years. The house may look nearly identical. The trees may still stand in the yard, and the familiar streets may evoke old memories. Yet the experience is entirely different because the visitor has accumulated decades of life—education, heartbreaks, achievements, disappointments, friendships, perhaps parenthood. The house has also changed in subtle ways. Paint has faded, neighbors have moved away, new families have arrived, and time has left its marks. The encounter is between two transformed realities: a changed place and a changed person.This insight explains why memories often feel different when revisited. A movie that seemed extraordinary in adolescence may appear simplistic in adulthood. A book that once felt boring may suddenly reveal profound wisdom years later. The work itself has not changed, but the reader has. Life experience provides new lenses through which we interpret the same material. Every encounter becomes a fresh meeting rather than a repetition.The quote also carries an important lesson about relationships. We often wish people would remain exactly as we remember them. Parents hope their children will never grow up. Friends try to preserve old dynamics despite changing careers, marriages, or responsibilities. Romantic partners sometimes expect each other to remain the same individuals they fell in love with years earlier. Heraclitus reminds us that such expectations are unrealistic. People inevitably evolve. Healthy relationships recognize this reality and adapt instead of resisting it.The same principle applies to society. Nations, cultures, economies, and technologies are never static. The world our grandparents knew differs profoundly from the one we inhabit today. Entire industries emerge while others disappear. Political systems rise and fall. Scientific discoveries overturn long-held assumptions. Social values evolve across generations. Attempts to freeze society at one particular moment often fail because history itself is a flowing river.The quote also encourages mindfulness. Since no moment can ever be repeated exactly, every experience becomes uniquely valuable. Watching a sunset, sharing dinner with loved ones, celebrating a milestone, or simply taking a walk all occur under conditions that will never exist again in precisely the same form. The people present will grow older. Our own perspective will evolve. Even if we return tomorrow, it will not truly be the same moment. Recognizing this impermanence deepens our appreciation for the present.At the same time, the quote challenges the common belief that people cannot change. Society often labels individuals based on past mistakes or previous identities. Heraclitus would reject such fixed judgments. A person who was irresponsible at twenty may become dependable at forty. Someone who lacked confidence may develop remarkable courage. Because human beings are always changing, no single moment defines an entire life. This insight underlies ideas of personal growth, forgiveness, and redemption.There is also a subtle paradox hidden within the quote.Heraclitus suggests that identity does not require absolute permanence. Instead, continuity exists through an ongoing process of change. The river remains "the river" not because its water is identical but because its flowing pattern continues. Human identity works similarly. We remain ourselves not because every part of us is unchanged but because our lives form a continuous narrative through constant transformation.Many later philosophers engaged with Heraclitus' ideas. Some disagreed, arguing that there must be permanent truths beneath appearances. Others expanded his insights into discussions about time, consciousness, and existence. Even today, psychologists, scientists, and writers continue to explore the tension between continuity and change that Heraclitus identified more than two and a half millennia ago.
Article Summary: Heraclitus was a Greek philosopher who lived around 500 BCE in the city of Ephesus. His philosophy revolved around the idea that reality is like a river: always moving, always transforming. Heraclitus invites us to recognize that permanence is an illusion and change is the only true constant.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Kayla Nicole reveal Travis Kelce cheated on her with a friend?
Article Text:
A viral social media post falsely claimed Kayla Nicole accused Travis Kelce of cheating with her friend and sacrificing $5 million for him. However, there is no verified evidence supporting the affair allegations, financial claims, or attributed quotes. Nicole never publicly named Kelce while discussing infidelity, making the widely shared post misleading and unsubstantiated.

Travis Kelce and Kayla Nicole viral claim falls apart under scrutiny

Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift continue life together as public interest remains high

A viral social media post has once again pulled Travis Kelce , Kayla Nicole and Taylor Swift into the spotlight, but this time for claims that simply do not hold up. The post alleges that Nicole caught Kelce having a secret affair with one of her friends, sacrificed millions for their relationship, and later said someone else "got the happy ending. " However, there is no credible evidence supporting any of those accusations. Readers should treat the circulating post as misinformation rather than fact.The social media post quickly gained millions of views by presenting dramatic allegations as though they were established facts. It claimed Kayla Nicole discovered Travis Kelce in a secret affair with one of her friends, gave up the entire $5 million she earned from YouTube during their relationship, and later reflected on the breakup with emotional remarks.Yet none of those claims have been verified.Even the Community Notes attached to the viral post points out that there are no verified reports showing Nicole made those allegations or the quoted statements. It also notes that while Nicole has spoken publicly about experiences with infidelity in past relationships, she never identified Kelce as the person involved.Likewise, there is no reliable evidence that she sacrificed "$5 million from YouTube" for Kelce.That figure appears to have been added to make the story more sensational.The viral post also attributes the following remarks to Nicole:“I helped create the man the world loves.”“Someone else got the happy ending.”There is no verified record of Kayla Nicole making those statements in connection with Travis Kelce.The episode is another reminder that highly emotional celebrity stories often spread much faster than the facts. Social media engagement does not make a claim true, and readers should rely on credible reporting before accepting such narratives.The false rumor has surfaced at a time when public curiosity surrounding Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift remains strong. Their relationship continues to attract widespread attention, with fans closely following their public appearances and personal milestones.However, it is important to separate verified developments from online speculation. While rumors about the couple frequently circulate across social media, readers should rely on confirmed reporting rather than viral posts that lack evidence.The same standard applies to stories involving Kayla Nicole. Discussions about her past relationship with Kelce often resurface online, but old narratives are frequently repackaged with fabricated quotes and unsupported allegations to generate clicks.In this case, there is no verified evidence that Kayla Nicole accused Travis Kelce of having an affair with her friend, no proof that she sacrificed $5 million in YouTube earnings for him, and no confirmation that she made the widely shared quotes attributed to her. The viral post is another reminder that popularity on social media is not the same as factual reporting.
Article Summary: A viral post falsely claimed Kayla Nicole accused Travis Kelce of cheating with her friend and sacrificing $5 million for him. There is no verified evidence supporting the affair allegations, financial claims, or attributed quotes. Nicole never publicly named Kelce while discussing infidelity, making the widely shared post misleading and unsubstantiated.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El Rubius was eliminated from MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

RCB register their second win

Poll Vote & Share your view Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right. 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) beat Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday. Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal put on a marauding batting show to lift RCB to a daunting 250/3. RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
